subject: Fermi GBM trigger 557852757/180905629 is not a GRB
body:
P. Veres (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:



"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 557852757/180905629

at 15:05:52.21 UT on 05 September 2018, tentatively classified as a GRB,

is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to particle activity."
